html:
Exclusive to:

This article is incomplete because of the evil sabotage by Maxwell....
Please help to improve the article, or discuss the issue with the community on the talk page according to the talk page etiquette or on our Discord.

The Royal Gallery Key is an item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC.

It is given to players from the Pig Queen in exchange for the Regal Scepter, Royal Crown, The Blue Sow or The Jeweled Truffle. It is used to unlock one of the items in the Royal Gallery.

Royal Gallery Key
"pedestal_key"
“Royal-key.”
–Wilson
“I just have to find out what it locks.”
–Willow
“Is key.”
–Wolfgang
“A key to trinkets.”
–Wendy
“PASSKEY”
–WX-78
“A key. But to what?”
–Wickerbottom
“What do you think this opens?”
–Woodie
“This seems rather ornate.”
–Maxwell
“Theoretically, it fits a lock somewhere.”
–Wagstaff
“A key for which to open treasures.”
–Wigfrid
“It's a key to open stuff.”
–Webber
“Wonder what it opens.”
–Walani
“It must unlock something.”
–Warly
“Argh! 'Tis fer tha'treasure?”
–Woodlegs
“WHATFORE IT OPEN-ETH?”
–Wilba
“Little key”
–Wormwood
“Locks and keys. The cornerstone of every good adventure.”
–Wheeler
The Royal Gallery Key is an item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC.
It is given to players from the Pig Queen in exchange for the Regal Scepter, Royal Crown, The Blue Sow or The Jeweled Truffle. It is used to unlock one of the items in the Royal Gallery.

The '''Royal Gallery Key''' is an [[item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC.

It is given to players from the [[Pig Queen]] in exchange for the [[Regal Scepter]], [[Royal Crown]], [[Lost_Relics#The_Blue_Sow|The Blue Sow]] or [[Lost_Relics#The_Jeweled_Truffle|The Jeweled Truffle]]. It is used to unlock one of the items in the [[Royal Gallery Exhibit|Royal Gallery]].
[[vi:Chìa Khóa Bộ Sưu Tập Hoàng Gia]]
